address.address1: Jalan Tgk Imuem Lueng Bata, No 201-202, Lueng Bata, Banda Aceh City

advanceGuaranteeProgram.description: Agoda Preferred recommends trusted and verified properties that have a long-standing relationship with Agoda and meet certain criteria.

favoriteFeatures.name: Airport transfer
favoriteFeatures.tooltip: Airport transfer available at additional charge. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Excellent room comfort & quality
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests have rated this property 10.0/10 on room comfort and quality

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Airport transfer
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Airport transfer available at additional charge. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 3-star property features restaurant to make your stay more indulgent and memorable.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: There is no one to contact at the hotel. The owner was unsresponsive & did not following up my contact
comments.reviewTitle: No front desk or check in info

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewTitle: Very clean and easy to access and the gist was very freindly and easy to access and communicate with

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Sesuai bintang, puas. Kekurangannya hanya jarang terlihat staff yang standby di lobby, tapi ada nomor yang bisa dihubungi. Rekomendasi.
comments.reviewTitle: Baru pertama kali dan langsung jadi rekomendasi

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Kamar sangat bersih, air lancar, harga murah, AC dingin banget.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Oke juga buat nginap sebelum berangkat ke bandara
